/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/image_loader.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/image_processor.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/ui_components.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/ui_controller.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/ui_state.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/ui_view.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/utils.c.o -o main  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/brumuchiuti/Downloads/SDL-Image-Processor/build libSDL3_image.0.5.0.dylib libSDL3_ttf.0.3.0.dylib -lm libSDL3.0.dylib
